name: willvowell-plugins

plugins.name: bookmark-income-engine

plugins.name: breathingcode-web-team

Twenty role-agents spanning strategy, design, engineering, and growth, plus ~40 specialist skills including industry-context caching, mockup-spec with anti-generic guardrails, and Claude Design handoff choreography.
